path.name: BrainEncodingCrackPath
path.definition: minimum closure path for claiming a unified explanation of brain encoding
path.formal: CrackPath = (PatchSection, WriteReadAsym, StageSuccessor, ProtoBridge, CausalProjection, ConstructiveClosure)

verdict.core_answer: To truly crack brain encoding, it is not enough to recover concept geometry. One must also recover read/write asymmetry, stage-successor transport, protocol bridge, causal projection, and constructive closure in one unified path.
